entries.title: TNP Client v0.2.0
entries.content:
TNP Client v0.2.0 — overlay network with encrypted tunnels

**Install (one command):**
```bash
# macOS / Linux
curl -fsSL https://get.tnp.network | sh

# Windows (PowerShell)
irm https://get.tnp.network/ps | iex
```

**Platforms:** linux-x64, linux-arm64, darwin-x64, darwin-arm64, windows-x64

**What's new:**
- Interactive CLI menu (`tnp` with no args)
- Overlay network: SOCKS5 proxy + encrypted WebSocket tunnels
- Service node mode (`tnp serve`)
- Become a relay node from the menu
- Cross-platform installer scripts

entries.title: TNP Client v0.1.0
entries.content:
TNP DNS resolver daemon v0.1.0

**Install:**
```
# macOS / Linux
curl -fsSL https://tnp.network/install.sh | sh

# Windows (PowerShell as Administrator)
irm https://tnp.network/install.ps1 | iex
```
